title: Aqtöbe Cold Snap
lead: Aqtöbe is experiencing a cold snap with a Z-Score of -1.50, indicating unusual weather. The Score of 5.0/10 reflects the severity of the anomaly.
body:
The current weather conditions in Aqtöbe are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, with an unusual level of coldness. 
 The relative humidity is at 60%, with no wind, which may exacerbate the perception of cold. 
 The city's energy consumption is likely to increase due to the cold snap, with 3.0 GG of Heating Degree Days (HDD).
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and adjust operations accordingly to mitigate the impact of the cold snap.
